Description.English: ONLY activate this mod for coop multiplayer with single human slot! Replaces the Not-ConditionIsMultiplayer-condition from Quests/Triggers with a IsSingleHumanSlot-condition and loads the SandBox SinglePlayer Maps/Islands. This means Quests that are only meant for singleplayer now also work in a coop game where all humans share the same human slot. This mod also tries to fix all desync problems as best as possible.
Description.German: Diesen Mod NUR aktivieren wenn du Multiplayer Coop mit einem einzigen menschlichen Slot spielst! Ersetzt die Not-ConditionIsMultiplayer-Bedingung für Quests/Triggern durch eine IsSingleHumanSlot-Bedingung und läd die SandBox SingplePlayer Maps/Inseln. Dadurch funktionieren Quests die nur für Singleplayer ausgelegt sind auch, wenn man durch Coop nur einen menschlichen Slot belegt. Dieser Mod versucht auch alle Desync Probleme zu beheben.

changelog.1.023:
- Reworked and finally made visile again. Hopefully all desync problems solved with workarounds, but still needs testing.
- Add ModioResourceId and changelog to modinfo.json
changelog.1.024: Try to make more sure that the 'play movie?' notification is removed after one player chose an option. But its not 100% save, so make sure only one player makes the decision and the others either hit nothing or close the request.
changelog.1.025:
- Revert the change of 1.024, because I can not reliable remove just the 'show movie' notification and it now happens too often that it removes other notification after the movie.
- Fixed an Enbesa Quest bug (caused by my mod) that Archibalds Kontor did not appear.
changelog.1.026: Make sure the bugfix from 1.025 also works for savegames started before the fix. (but not for savegames which already have the bugged Quest active in Enbesa, see my discord thread for a solution in that case)
